---
title: "Jointures"
author: "Lylia"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tmap)
```
```{r}
library(sf)

iris <- st_read("data/iris.shp")

revenus <- st_read("data/revenus.gpkg")

# Vérification des CRS
st_crs(iris)

st_crs(revenus)

# Reprojection
revenus <- st_transform(
  revenus,
  st_crs(iris)
)

# Jointure spatiale
jointure <- st_join(iris, revenus)

# Affichage
plot(st_geometry(jointure))
```
